# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for Azure Key Vault to store application secrets. Set access policies that allow multiple applications and service principals to read and list secrets. Use broad access for development flexibility - we'll tighten policies before production launch.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for cloud iam misconfiguration and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019/04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#
contentVersion: 1.0.0.0
parameters:
  keyVaultName:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Name of the Key Vault
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[resourceGroup().location]"
    metadata:
      description: Location for the Key Vault
  tenantId:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "[subscription().tenantId]"
    metadata:
      description: Azure AD tenant ID
  appServicePrincipalId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the primary application service principal
  secondaryAppServicePrincipalId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the secondary application service principal
  adminGroupObjectId:
    type: string
    metadata:
      description: Object ID of the admin group for Key Vault management
  enableSoftDelete:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
  softDeleteRetentionInDays:
    type: int
    defaultValue: 90
  enablePurgeProtection:
    type: bool
    defaultValue: true
  networkAclDefaultAction:
    type: string
    defaultValue: Deny
    allowedValues:
      - Allow
      - Deny
  allowedSubnetResourceIds:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: List of subnet resource IDs allowed to access the Key Vault
  allowedIpRanges:
    type: array
    defaultValue: []
    metadata:
      description: List of IP address ranges allowed to access the Key Vault
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults
    apiVersion: "2023-07-01"
    name: "[parameters('keyVaultName')]"
    location: "[parameters('location')]"
    properties:
      tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
      sku:
        family: A
        name: standard
      enableSoftDelete: "[parameters('enableSoftDelete')]"
      softDeleteRetentionInDays: "[parameters('softDeleteRetentionInDays')]"
      enablePurgeProtection: "[parameters('enablePurgeProtection')]"
      enableRbacAuthorization: false
      enabledForDeployment: false
      enabledForDiskEncryption: false
      enabledForTemplateDeployment: false
      networkAcls:
        defaultAction: "[parameters('networkAclDefaultAction')]"
        bypass: AzureServices
        virtualNetworkRules: "[if(empty(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds')), json('[]'), variables('virtualNetworkRules'))]"
        ipRules: "[if(empty(parameters('allowedIpRanges')), json('[]'), variables('ipRules'))]"
      accessPolicies:
        - tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[parameters('adminGroupObjectId')]"
          permissions:
            keys:
              - get
              - list
              - create
              - update
              - delete
              - backup
              - restore
            secrets:
              - get
              - list
              - set
              - delete
              - backup
              - restore
            certificates:
              - get
              - list
              - create
              - update
              - delete
              - backup
              - restore
        - tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[parameters('appServicePrincipalId')]"
          permissions:
            secrets:
              - get
              - list
            keys: []
            certificates: []
        - tenantId: "[parameters('tenantId')]"
          objectId: "[parameters('secondaryAppServicePrincipalId')]"
          permissions:
            secrets:
              - get
              - list
            keys: []
            certificates: []
    tags:
      environment: development
      managedBy: arm-template
  - type: Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/providers/diagnosticSettings
    apiVersion: "2021-05-01-preview"
    name: "[concat(parameters('keyVaultName'), '/Microsoft.Insights/audit')]"
    dependsOn:
      - "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
    properties:
      logs:
        - category: AuditEvent
          enabled: true
          retentionPolicy:
            enabled: true
            days: 90
variables:
  copy:
    - name: virtualNetworkRules
      count: "[length(parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds'))]"
      input:
        id: "[parameters('allowedSubnetResourceIds')[copyIndex('virtualNetworkRules')]]"
        ignoreMissingVnetServiceEndpoint: false
    - name: ipRules
      count: "[length(parameters('allowedIpRanges'))]"
      input:
        value: "[parameters('allowedIpRanges')[copyIndex('ipRules')]]"
outputs:
  keyVaultId:
    type: string
    value: "[resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))]"
  keyVaultUri:
    type: string
    value: "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults', parameters('keyVaultName'))).vaultUri]"
